name: sagar-plugins
description: Sagar's personal Factory plugins marketplace — multi-model droid toolkit split into focused plugins.

plugins.name: investigation
plugins.description: Investigation droids: fast triage (quick-analysis), thorough repo investigation (deep-understanding), external web research (deep-research), and root-cause debugging (debugger).

plugins.name: review
plugins.description: Pre-merge review droids: strict diff reviewer (change-review) and security reviewer (security).

plugins.name: synthesis
plugins.description: Synthesis droids: PR description writer (pr-describer) and Conventional Commits message writer (commit-message-writer).

plugins.name: meta
plugins.description: Meta droids and skills for working on agentic configs themselves: prompt audit (prompt-optimizer), apply (doc-generator), and the audit-and-apply-loop methodology skill.

plugins.name: practices
plugins.description: Engineering-discipline skills: spec (plan and decompose), TDD workflow, coding standards, verification loop, and agentic-engineering operating principles.

plugins.name: build
plugins.description: Hands-on tools that change code: implementer (applies approved review findings, spec units, or fix lists), test-engineer (finds the riskiest untested behavior and writes the missing tests), and the fix-pr skill plus /fix-pr command (fetch, reason about, fix, reply, resolve, wait for CI, and approve PRs end-to-end).
